name: VTIL_SetSignalRaw
title: VTIL_SetSignalRaw
syntax: long VTIL_SetSignalRaw( dbSignal signal, long value );
description: Sets the signal to the specified raw value. The message of the signal is sent according the configured send type.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Signal name from database.The signal must be assigned to the node as Tx signal.
